title: Markdown to Image
subtitle: Turn Markdown, AI responses, and structured notes into clean, shareable image cards.
features: Local browser rendering; Markdown content is not uploaded to NavoKit servers
Supports common Markdown such as headings, lists, tables, and code blocks
Clean card layout for social sharing and document archives
processingNote: Rendering and export happen in your browser.
homePreviewText: Turn Markdown, AI answers, or notes into a clean image card for sharing.
